summary: Thread STAR Draft A (FR-CV-01): LLM-backed POST /api/threads/:id/star-draft generates an ephemeral STAR card draft for a completed thread (narrative from LLM, confidence/reasonCodes forced by service); Thread 'STAR 회고' done-thread-only UI. No DB write/migration/persistence/export. Note: the plan-defined reasonCode star_result_uses_settlement substring-matches the no-persistence scan token star_result but is a reason code, not a DB column.
